UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Dan Stone.
Attorney Mercedes Gavin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sasha Miranda IS NOT present. Defendants Onnapa Sangin, Carmin Anna Cole and Tamara Cole are present.
Attorney Teresa Friend representing the defendant Tamara Cole through full scope. Attorney Ken Chan representing defendants Onnapa Sangin and Carmin Anna Cole through full scope.

The parties do not confer with Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber in Dept. 505A, parties confer in hallway for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-10-2012 remains on calendar.
